programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Inside the rise and near-collapse of WeWork, the startup co-founded by its former CEO, Adam Neumann, who mesmerizes venture capitalists with grandiose promises, even though WeWork turns out to be a traditional real estate leasing business.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Two doctors run their Alabama pain clinics like heartless pill mills-illegally prescribing opioids while destroying lives and pocketing millions.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Former quarterback Art Schlichter was once looked up to at Ohio State University; when he sinks into a gambling addiction, he throws it all away, becoming a fast-talking con artist whose only game is looking for the next score.
